summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Live Chat & Reactions feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads for guests with events carousel
Create Event page shows 'Audience Interaction' section
Create Event page has Live Chat toggle switch (data-testid='chat-toggle')
Create Event page has Chat Mode options: Open Chat, Questions Only, Moderated
Create Event page has Live Reactions toggle switch (data-testid='reactions-toggle')
Create Event page shows educational tip when chat/reactions enabled
Create Event page shows reaction emojis preview (❤️ 👏 🔥 😂 😮) when reactions enabled
Event Detail page shows 'Live Q&A' badge when chat enabled with questions_only mode
Event Detail page shows 'Live Reactions' badge when reactions enabled
Event Detail page shows LiveChat component for live events with chat enabled
LiveChat component shows Q&A Mode badge for questions_only chat mode
LiveChat component shows message count
LiveChat component shows messages with 'Q:' prefix for questions
LiveChat component shows pinned message indicator
LiveChat component shows reaction buttons with counts
API: GET /api/events/{id}/chat - returns enabled status and messages (200)
API: GET /api/events/{id}/chat - returns disabled for non-chat events (200)
API: GET /api/events/{id}/chat - returns 404 for invalid event
API: POST /api/events/{id}/chat - send message as authenticated user (200)
API: POST /api/events/{id}/chat - returns 401 for unauthenticated user
API: POST /api/events/{id}/chat - returns 400 for chat-disabled event
API: GET /api/events/{id}/reactions/count - returns reaction counts (200)
API: GET /api/events/{id}/reactions/count - returns disabled for non-reactions events
API: POST /api/events/{id}/reactions - send reaction as authenticated user (200)
API: POST /api/events/{id}/reactions - all reaction types work (heart, clap, fire, laugh, wow)
API: POST /api/events/{id}/reactions - returns 400 for invalid reaction type
API: POST /api/events/{id}/reactions - returns 401 for unauthenticated user
API: POST /api/events/{id}/reactions - returns 400 for reactions-disabled event
API: GET /api/events/{id} - returns chat_enabled, reactions_enabled, chat_mode fields
API: POST /api/events/{id}/chat/{message_id}/pin - creator can pin messages (200)
API: POST /api/events/{id}/chat/{message_id}/hide - creator can hide messages (200)
API: GET /api/events - public events list works (200)
API: POST /api/admin/login - admin authentication works (200)
Admin panel login works at /admin/login with admin@showmelive.com / admin123
Admin dashboard shows all tabs: Overview, Users, Events, Tickets, Live, Bank
seed_data_creation: Created test creator user with session, test event with chat_enabled=true, reactions_enabled=true, chat_mode='questions_only', status='live', and another test event with chat/reactions disabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Live Chat & Reactions feature fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Create Event page has Audience Interaction section with Live Chat toggle, Chat Mode options (Open/Questions Only/Moderated), and Live Reactions toggle. 2) Event Detail page shows Live Q&A badge (for questions_only mode) or Live Chat badge, plus Live Reactions badge. 3) LiveChat component displays for live events with chat enabled - shows messages, Q&A mode indicator, reaction buttons with counts. 4) All chat/reactions API endpoints working: GET/POST chat messages, GET/POST reactions, pin/hide message moderation. Note: WebRTC streaming is UI only (MOCKED). Plaid bank linking uses manual form (MOCKED).

mocked_apis.webrtc_streaming: UI only, no actual WebRTC implementation - buttons and controls work but don't connect to real streaming
mocked_apis.plaid_bank_linking: Uses manual form instead of Plaid Link due to missing API keys
